zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Heriz II於1241年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾恭納爾斯頓時，他的父親Sir John I Heriz, Knight42歲，母親Sarah de Wingfield21歲。他於大約1276年與Sarah de Rochford在英國英格蘭艾可洛福德結婚。他去世於1299年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heriz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Assyrian/Chaldean: from the personal name Hermiz, a derivative of Persian Hormizd, name borne by an Assyrian/Chaldean saint from the 7th century. Compare Hirmiz .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Heriz II was born in 1241, in Gonalston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John I Heriz, Knight, was 42 and his mother, Sarah de Wingfield, was 21. He married Sarah de Rochford about 1276, in Rochford, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1299, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Heriz II est né en 1241, à Gonalston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John I Heriz, Knight, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Wingfield, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Sarah de Rochford environ 1276, à Rochford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1299, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Heriz IIが1241年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアゴナルストンで生まれた時，父Sir John I Heriz, Knightは42歳，母Sarah de Wingfieldは21歳であった。約1276年にイギリスイギリスエセックスロチフォードでSarah de Rochfordと結婚した。彼は1299年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Heriz II(이)가 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 곤알스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Heriz, Knight(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Wingfield(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 록h퍼드에서 Sarah de Rochford(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Heriz II родился в 1241 г. в местности гоналстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John I Heriz, Knight было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Wingfield, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah de Rochford около 1276 г. в местности рочфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1299 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.
